/* Nyochaa data XML wee weghachite ozi nwa akwụkwọ maka aha njirimara na okwuntughe enyere. Data XML ga-enwe usoro ndị a:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

Anyị nwere ike wulite ajụjụ XPath ma jiri ya chọọ.

@param xml_data Data XML nwere ozi nwa akwụkwọ.
@param username Aha njirimara nke nwa akwụkwọ a ga-achọ.
@param password Okwuntughe nke nwa akwụkwọ a ga-achọ.

@return Maapụ nwere ozi nwa akwụkwọ (aha, afọ, nwa amaala) ma ọ bụrụ na achọtara ya, ma ọ bụghị ya, maapụ efu. */
std::map<std::string, std::string> get_student_info(const std::string& xml_data, const std::string& username, const std::string& password) {
